div.div: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu 4th Season
Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, Thriller

The fourth season of Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu. To save his stricken allies, Subaru faces a deadly desert to find the Sage at Pleiades Watchtower. (Source: Crunchyroll News) Note: Lucca Comics & Games pre-screened episode 1 early on November 1, 2025, prior to the Japanese television broadcast on July 8th, 2026.

The fifth season of Kanojo, Okarishimasu. Note: Kanojo, Okarishimasu 5th Season was streamed 2 days in advance of the TV broadcast on DMM TV beginning April 8, 2026. Regular broadcasting began on April 11, 2026.
